transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to have you here. I hope you didn't have too much trouble finding the place.

My name is Sarah, and I'll be conducting your interview today for the Software Engineer position. We're really excited to meet candidates who might be joining our team, so I hope you'll relax and just have a natural conversation with me.

Before we dive into the technical stuff, I'd love to just get to know you a little bit. So to start things off, could you tell me a bit about yourself and what drew you to apply for this position?
